improvements_in_v3: Probabilistic trip events replace deterministic post bias
Inside post 1 no longer flat-penalized; closers from inside get probabilistic boxed-in (6%, P/S only)
Outside speed (E/EP from 15+) only penalized on fast pace shape (speed-to-the-outside principle)
EP tactical-speed bonus (+2.5 ability) for Derby's preferred profile

horses.name: Renegade
horses.notes: Clean rail pocket trip (#2 not quick, #3-4 may send, #5 not quick) to stalk while saving ground; Welsch 'not flashy but exactly what you want'; powered home in last pair; Pletcher 2x Derby winner

horses.name: Albus
horses.notes: G2 Wood winner from well back, tactical speed shown; needs hefty Beyer jump (84 vs par 103); back better after break

horses.name: Intrepido
horses.notes: Welsch 4/26 'even quicker than Potente, honing speed for Derby Day'; Kaitton conflicting read no spark in mornings; 3yo figs on par with 2yo (regression risk)

horses.name: Litmus Test
horses.notes: Welsch 4/23 serious gate work, Bob very pleased; sending hard from post 4 into contested pace (16/17 also sending); blinkers reapplied; last 11 blinkers-on best finish 4th

horses.name: Right to Party
horses.notes: Welsch 'just okay' on 4/18, 'asked more than company' on 4/25 final; lack of speed compounds Wood-style trip; McPeek won 2024 with Mystik Dan

horses.name: Commandment
horses.notes: 4-of-5 winner with 2 triple-digit Beyers; won close decisions in last 2 (guts); Into Mischief sire produced 3 Derby winners; Cox won 2021 Mandaloun

horses.name: Danon Bourbon
horses.notes: No published Beyers or TFUS (international horse); Kaitton: bolted twice badly, reluctant to train forward — major red flag; yet to race counter-clockwise; Forever Young is the benchmark

horses.name: So Happy
horses.notes: Welsch openly underwhelmed: 'lazy in mornings, not particularly impressive by Derby standards'; TFUS Power Pick; SA Derby winner; Mike Smith aboard; daddy won this race

horses.name: The Puma
horses.notes: Welsch: 4/18 GP work was super, 'reminiscent of how Delgado brought Mage'; Mage-style steady gallops not sharp finals; in Mage's Barn 42 stall; paired top Beyers 100/100

horses.name: Wonder Dean
horses.notes: No published Beyers (Japanese horse); Welsch: 'still not doing all that much', 4/25 6f drill effectively a 5f, broke slow; UAE Derby G2 winner; TFUS 107 from TimeformUS-assigned equivalent

horses.name: Incredibolt
horses.notes: Welsch: particularly impressive first impression since returning to CD; VA Derby winner; 2-for-2 at CD; no Beyers cracking 90 still a ceiling concern

horses.name: Chief Wallabee
horses.notes: Welsch most enthused horse all week: 'reminds me going back to Sovereignty last year'; 4/20 stunner work in blinkers, 4/26 maintenance with totally in hand; FL Derby loss was focus not ability

horses.name: Silent Tactic
horses.notes: Renegade beat him handily in Ark Derby but reportedly fighting foot bruise; trainer Casse says past it; needs career-top Beyer to contend

horses.name: Potente
horses.notes: Favorable post 14 to stalk contested pace; improving Beyers each start; Kaitton's contrarian Medina-Spirit-style Baffert pick; Welsch blistering 5f 57.77 work; cost $2.4M

horses.name: Emerging Market
horses.notes: Welsch: 'loved him', big gallout 59.4/1:13.3 on fast track, Pratt sitting chilly; undefeated 2/2 with G2 LA Derby win; only Leonatus (1883) won Derby off just 2 starts; Brown overdue

horses.name: Pavlovian
horses.notes: Welsch: AE Robusta 'looked better than Pavlovian'; sandwiched in pace duel with 4/17; LA Derby was flattered by speed bias day; Chip Honcho was probably the better horse

horses.name: Six Speed
horses.notes: No published Beyers (UAE horse); TFUS 103 from TimeformUS-assigned equivalent; stopped at 9.5f in UAE Derby — distance concern at 10f; UAE Derby horses 0-for-21 historically

horses.name: Further Ado
horses.notes: Quantified trip credit: avoids used-up-clearing event (~+2 EV) plus structural stalking advantage (+0.5); Welsch 2nd-favorite all week; top Beyer 106 + top Brisnet 105; JV 2-of-3 first-time-jock Derby wins since 2010

horses.name: Golden Tempo
horses.notes: 3rd in G2 LA Derby; Beyers creeping north; deepest closer in field; first action away from FG; snappy KEE works; Curlin progeny stamina

horses.name: Fulleffort
horses.notes: Deep closer benefits from 75% fast pace lock (modest trip credit); Welsch tipped as price play after final drill; 'might be flying under radar'; better suited to dirt than Final Gambit; Ed's top longshot pick
